item.title: About
item.description: Hi, I’m Anoop P 👋 I’m a software developer and educator based in India. I create coding tutorials and developer content on this blog and on YouTube . What I Cover I write and make videos about: Python — scripting, automation, data handling C++ & Java — fundamentals, data structures, algorithms Flutter & Dart — cross-platform mobile development Git & DevOps — version control, workflows, tools Databases — PostgreSQL, CRUD operations, SQL Android Development — native apps, productivity tools Why #anooptube The name started as my YouTube handle and stuck.
